title: P1：全鄉鎮兩階段表單、日期精簡、行前建議正名、UV 與日出日落接入
environment: Executor: ubuntu-dev mainline worktree at /home/esgcenter0/python/Academic/trip-weather-planner using ~/venvs/python-env

context.background: User performed the first real hands-on session (Mac browser via SSH tunnel, backend live mode on port 18082) and returned four findings: (1) the town dropdown only shows the curated 22-entry starter list, while the towns.py docstring promises full CWA-sourced coverage in live mode — this promise is not implemented, /api/towns unconditionally serves the static dict; (2) the date picker shows a full calendar with year although the CWA township horizon is only ~7 days; (3) the summary panel is branded 'AI 行前建議' while running rule-based mode with no Gemini key, which is misleading; (4) UV index and sunrise/sunset are natural trip-planning data available from the same CWA platform but absent from the product.
context.design: Keep the adapter -> normalized schema -> service -> router contract. All new upstream calls go through backend adapters with caching and tolerant parsing; no key or third-party call ever reaches the frontend. AI (Gemini) work is explicitly deferred: this card ships a stable non-AI version first, per user decision.
context.known_bug: backend/app/services/ai_summary.py summarize() always describes days[0] (first forecast day), not the user-selected travel date. router passes full-horizon days and never focuses the target date. Visible whenever target_date != first horizon day.
context.deadline_note: Exam submission deadline is 2026-07-06 12:00. CWA has announced a forecast-API format change effective 2026-07-06 — tolerant parsing (.get() access, try/except, no hardcoded deep paths) is an explicit acceptance requirement, not a nice-to-have.

in_scope: S1 full town coverage: in live mode (CWA_API_KEY set), /api/towns serves the complete ~368-township list sourced from CWA (F-D0047 aggregate family, e.g. F-D0047-091, or better dataset per current Swagger), cached in-process with a long TTL; keep the curated 22-entry static dict as the only source in mock mode and as live-failure fallback
S2 two-stage destination form: frontend TripForm becomes county select -> township select (township options filtered by chosen county); town payload/schema may add a grouping field if needed

S3 date simplification: replace the year-bearing date input with a 7-day chip/selector row rendered as M/D plus weekday (e.g. 7/4（六）), values constrained to today..today+6; default view (no explicit selection) loads and shows the full week immediately; optionally add quick-select shortcuts 今天/明天/週末 mapping to dates within the window (nice-to-have, skip if time-constrained)

S4 target-date focus fix: when a day is selected, the summary must describe that selected date (fix ai_summary primary-day logic and/or router wiring so the focused day is the target date, falling back to first day only when the target is outside the horizon)

S5 label honesty: rename the summary panel to 行前建議 (no AI branding) in frontend and any response fields/docs that surface the label; keep the dual-mode gemini/rule-based backend code intact but dormant — do not remove it, do not enable it
S6 sunrise/sunset: new CWA adapter for dataset A-B0062 (日出日沒時刻), county-level, cached; surface sunrise/sunset for the selected county alongside the forecast

S7 UV index: integrate the best currently-available CWA UV dataset (verify on the CWA Swagger at implementation time; observation family O-A0005 station-based is the known baseline — map township to nearest station by lat/lon); display UV with a simple level label (低/中/高/過量/危險); if only observation (not forecast) exists, present it as 目前紫外線 and say so honestly in the UI
S8 tests: unit tests for the new adapters (mock-based, no live calls in CI), town-list live/mock switching, 7-day date window validation, and the target-date focus fix
S9 docs: update README status section (currently stale at 2026-07-02 scaffold wording) and architecture docs to reflect this card's shipped behavior
out_of_scope: Gemini / any AI-generated summary activation (deferred to a later phase by user decision)
MOENV air-quality (AQI) integration (deferred to a later phase by user decision)
CWA weather warnings/advisories (W-C0033) — backlog, not this card
Cloud Run deployment and public URL work
Visual redesign beyond the form and label changes described above

requirements: R1: Zero-credential mock mode keeps working end-to-end exactly as before (22 towns, deterministic data)
R2: With CWA_API_KEY set, town coverage is the full CWA township list, not the curated subset
R3: All new upstream parsing is tolerant (.get() access, try/except, timeouts, no hardcoded deep field paths) because of the announced 2026-07-06 CWA format change
R4: No secrets hardcoded or committed; frontend continues to talk only to our backend
R5: Summary text always matches the user-focused date (bug fix S4)
R6: English-only code comments per coding standards
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Ubuntu ruff check passes for backend
AC2: Ubuntu backend pytest passes including new tests for S1/S3/S4/S6/S7
AC3: Frontend npm run build passes
AC4: Live mode /api/towns returns >= 300 townships; a non-curated township (e.g. 新北市貢寮區) is selectable through county->township form and returns a valid forecast
AC5: Mock mode (CWA_API_KEY unset) still returns the deterministic 22-town list and mock forecast
AC6: Date UI shows no year anywhere; selectable range is exactly today..today+6; with no selection the full week renders by default
AC7: Selecting a non-first day produces a summary describing that day (regression test included)
AC8: Sunrise/sunset for the selected destination's county is displayed and sourced from A-B0062 via backend adapter with cache
AC9: UV information is displayed with level label and honest wording about observation vs forecast; township-to-station mapping is deterministic and tested
AC10: Summary panel label reads 行前建議 with no AI wording while in rule-based mode
AC11: README status section is updated and consistent with shipped behavior
AC12: Resulting Ubuntu changes are committed to the mainline (not left as dirty tree) and pushed to origin
references: docs/台灣公開API接入清單_旅行目的地評估.md

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Start Ubuntu-side coding on cathay-cloud-intern-p1-ux-refresh-and-cwa-data-expansion: full township coverage with a county->township two-stage form, year-free 7-day date chips defaulting to the whole week, fix the summary-describes-wrong-day bug, rename the panel to 行前建議, and add CWA sunrise/sunset plus UV display. AI and AQI stay deferred.
next_task_hint: After AC1-AC12 pass, the natural follow-ups are (a) Gemini activation with honest AI labeling, (b) MOENV AQI integration, then (c) actual cloud deploy once a deploy auth path is completed.
